reviews.review_msg: Took Dr. Zaman's class in the fall sem, she is literally the best prof i've had at SFU. She is kind, caring, knowledgeable, and much more! Do take this class if you can, it's so easy and you learn so much about politics, it really helped me stay concrete in my decision of being a pol sci major!
literally the best prof i had in sfu, take ALL her classes omg.

Super easy and entertaining lectures, but it does take a while to get grades back. Quizzes and participation boost marks as well. Super open to questions, and seems super interested in what students have to say about the topics, so dont be shy to raise your hand. Would take again!!

Amazing spectacular graceful beautiful prof. Literally the best prof in sfu dare I say. Her grading is very clear, her office hours are so helpful, she's a very approachable prof and made me looove politics. Final and quizzes were easy her lectures are very engaging and fun. I never paid attention to any lecture in sfu except for her lectures.

Sahar is a fantastic prof! Perfect for students who are easing into university, highly reliable and cares about the course she's teaching. Every course material has clear guidelines/rubrics. Lectures and textbook readings have a lot of overlap, course load is manageable.

I would take all her classes again tbh, she's motivating and clear with her grading. For every quiz and the exam, she gives us a sheet where she puts all the terms and things you need to know which has immensely helped everyone tbh. She's the sweetest and the topic's she covers are interesting.

Professors lectures are clean & constructed, mandatory discussion questions posted during lecture & are graded as well. Not loaded questions but can be annoying after a while. Tutorials attendance is mandatory.

Best class I've taken so far, super easy to understand/engaging lectures. There was a textbook, but it's not really mandatory; her lectures cover a general basis, and tutorials deep dive. She's passionate about what she teaches, and it shows. She's an absolute queen, loved her class, would take again 1000%!

Very knowledgeable, talks very clearly at a pace we can follow along and still covers all material. She is truly kind and can help with any technical issues or other questions you may have. Her slides are perfect for studying and easy to follow. She makes this course interesting and the videos she shows us relate perfectly to what we are learning.
She's the greatest to ever do it

Great professor. She's very approachable and knowledgeable about course content. Very good foundation course if you're studying Political Science. Quizzes/exams/assignments are fair, and she posts the slides. Would recommend doing the readings, but you can probably get by without them

Literally such a chill teacher but also actually seems to be interested in what she's talking about at the same time. Easy to listen to in lecture and answers questions in lecture if needed. For POL100 there are in class discussion questions to answer but she doesn't take attendance in lecture. She is my queen
